title: WS1 token measurement validation green
body: Floating Lifting Thermal: WS1 token measurement display is implemented in the current working tree. Reusable Practice fitness logic now lives under agent-tools/src/practice-fitness, fitness estimates content-only tokens with the chars/4 rule, and reports render a Tokens row without token threshold semantics. I did not implement WS2+ token frontmatter, convention docs, or manifest coverage. Validation passed: focused Vitest for src/practice-fitness, @oaknational/agent-tools type-check, lint, build, and practice:fitness:informational. Active commit queue remains empty; other overlapping WS1 claims are still live, so I am closing only my claim.
